controls.title: Designate a qualified individual responsible for the information security program
controls.description: Designate a qualified individual responsible for the information security program

controls.title: Identify reasonably foreseeable internal and external risks
controls.description: Identify reasonably foreseeable internal and external risks

controls.title: Assess likelihood and potential damage of risks
controls.description: Assess likelihood and potential damage of risks

controls.title: Assess sufficiency of safeguards in place
controls.description: Assess sufficiency of safeguards in place

controls.title: Identify and manage data, personnel, devices, systems, and facilities
controls.description: Identify and manage data, personnel, devices, systems, and facilities

controls.title: Encrypt all customer information at rest and in transit
controls.description: Encrypt all customer information at rest and in transit

controls.title: Implement MFA for anyone accessing customer information
controls.description: Implement MFA for anyone accessing customer information

controls.title: Monitor and log authorized user activity
controls.description: Monitor and log authorized user activity

controls.title: Continuous monitoring or annual penetration testing + biannual vulnerability assessment
controls.description: Continuous monitoring or annual penetration testing + biannual vulnerability assessment

controls.title: Implement policies and procedures for secure disposal
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures for secure disposal

controls.title: Monitor, evaluate, and adjust the information security program
controls.description: Monitor, evaluate, and adjust the information security program

controls.title: Report to the board of directors annually
controls.description: Report to the board of directors annually

controls.title: Notify FTC of security events affecting 500+ consumers within 30 days
controls.description: Notify FTC of security events affecting 500+ consumers within 30 days
